---
title: "Videos & Resources"
---

Walkthroughs and tutorials for navigating the WISSPAR database and interpreting
immunogenicity data.

::: {.callout-note}
Video tutorials are hosted on the WISSPAR site. If a video below does not load,
you can also find the latest content on the [WISSPAR blog](blog.qmd).
:::

## Getting started with WISSPAR

<div class="ratio ratio-16x9" style="max-width:760px;margin:1rem 0;">
  <iframe src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/EyATFcWPXBQ"
          title="WISSPAR walkthrough"
          allowfullscreen
          referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin"></iframe>
</div>


## More resources

- [Blog](blog.qmd) — updates, methods notes, and commentary.
- [Graphical View](graphical-view.qmd) — the interactive immunogenicity comparison tool.
- [Clinical Trials Overview](trials.qmd) — browse the trials in the database.
